videos.title: Training for the Dreiländergiro @Wienerwald
videos.description:
Hello cycling friends and Vienna_Vegan_Cyclist followers!

In this video from 2023-05 Gran Fondo (over 100km) I train in the Wienerwald for the Dreiländergiro next month.

Chapters:
00:00 Intro
00:11 The Route
00:27 Lunchtime
00:48 Start
07:37 Credits


You can look up the ride and all stats on strava:
https://strava.app.link/XHXPrO2qYAb
Thanks,
VVC
